rationale: Hard pass. A Goku/Ultra Instinct anime celebrity hook is wildly off-DNA for Marble Sort!: the saturated red/blue/yellow shonen palette clashes with the soft lavender/pastel aesthetic, the franchise IP exposes us to trademark/IP takedown risk, and the high-energy "power up" pitch repels the 25-55 female casual puzzle audience we target. There is also zero connective tissue to the sorting/physics core loop, so even if it drove installs they would not retain.
